rationale: Ground truth has no substantive reviewer concerns (bot noise + 'thanks'), so both candidates are judged on diff-grounded quality alone. Both correctly verify the core fix (>=10 → ==10 excludes sm_120/121) and independently raise the same legitimate sm_110a gap as a hedged minor note with concrete file:line. Y goes further with explicit caller-chain tracing (quack_fp8.py→patch.py:412-414), a broader validated checklist, and one additional concrete finding (stale 'Blackwell-only' comment in pyproject.toml:102) that X doesn't surface, giving Y a modest edge in thoroughness and actionability without sacrificing precision.
